description: Destroy-capability but Go uses a plain confirm gate (no bypass gate); Python enforces the dispatch bypass gate. Only the agreed cases are pinned: cluster_id-required and the confirmed+bypassed POST. The confirm-alone gate diverges (see report). Regenerates a service token by design.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_lke_cluster_regenerate is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
